MODULE: cosmos.desktop.hotkeys
FILE: cosmos/desktop/hotkeys.py (81 lines)
CATEGORY: desktop

DESCRIPTION: Global Hotkey Handler for Cosmos Desktop.

CLASSES:
- GlobalHotkey: Register and handle global hotkeys.

Uses the 'keyboard' library for cross-platf
  Methods: def start(self)
  Methods: def stop(self)
  Methods: def update_hotkey(self, new_hotkey: str)
